name: ai-mission-assistant-demo
description: AI Mission Assistant demo — React (Vite) frontend, Express backend, Supabase (Postgres).

scripts.types:generate: supabase gen types typescript --local --schema public > frontend/src/types/database.types.ts
scripts.test:run: npm run db:test && npm run test:run --workspace frontend
scripts.test:e2e: npm run db:test && npm run test:e2e --workspace frontend
